def solve(nums)
  n = nums.length
  total_sum = 0

  # The minimum total sum of x's required is the sum of all positive differences 
  # between adjacent elements (nums[i] - nums[i+1] where nums[i] > nums[i+1]).
  (0...(n - 1)).each do |i|
    diff = nums[i] - nums[i+1]
    
    if diff > 0
      total_sum += diff
    end
  end

  return total_sum

```ruby
def solve(nums)
  n = nums.length
  total_sum = 0

  # Iterate through adjacent pairs
  (0...(n - 1)).each do |i|
    diff = nums[i] - nums[i+1]
    
    # We only care about positive differences, which represent required increases
    if diff > 0
      total_sum += diff
    end
  end

  return total_sum
end
```
